name: Autumn — Love me more (than her)
description:
**Your dead lover's sister, who has always been jealous of her perfect sister, slipped in right after the funeral.**
(Requested character, credit: Anonymous)
___
*Interesting premise, but I was hesitant about it since it directed user's action quite a bit, which I usually try to avoid and is also the main reason why requested characters still take me decent amount of time even if it's a detailed request, mostly just rewriting things so it sticks to the request but focuses on the character's perspective.* 
___
*Have a specific character you'd like to see? Refer to my profile page for information regarding character request.*
*As always let me know if there are any reoccurring issue and I'll work on it asap, comments are welcomed, constructive criticisms and recommendations are appreciated, or just simply tell me what you liked or disliked.*
